name: remote-host-verifier
description: Verify commands across this machine and named SSH hosts, comparing versions, install paths, config, and behavior with clean local/remote evidence.

interface.shortDescription: Verify commands across this machine and named SSH hosts, comparing versions, install paths, config, and behavior with clean local/remote evidence.
interface.longDescription: Verify commands across this machine and named SSH hosts, comparing versions, install paths, config, and behavior with clean local/remote evidence. Works best on a local machine with user-specific files and tools available.
defaultPrompt: Verify this command locally and on the named remote host(s). Capture versions, paths, output differences, and a final pass/fail verdict with exact commands.
